query: Sure, my user ID is raj_sanchez_7340. I don’t have the reservation ID handy, but the trip I want to cancel is from Philadelphia to LaGuardia. Can you help me find it?

candidate_answers.text: Thanks for sharing your user ID. I’ll look up your reservations first so I can identify the Philadelphia to LaGuardia trip you want to cancel.
The user has provided an account identifier and trip description but not the reservation ID, so the grounded next move is to retrieve the user details before selecting the booking to cancel.
